announcements.details: Read the commentary for the 5th Sunday of Lent.
announcements.title: Commentary: 5th Sunday of Lent

announcements.details: There will be ONE mass on Sunday, 29th March, 2026. Offertory will be led by the St. Theresa of the Child Jesus Society and Friday borns. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors. Mass will begin at the Community 19 gate with the Palm Sunday Procession.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Palm Sunday

announcements.details: There will be Easter sales on Palm Sunday, March 29th. Interested vendors should kindly register with Mrs Rebecca Amanor-Ofori or either of the church secretaries.
announcements.title: Easter Sales

announcements.details: There will be In His Presence on Sunday 29th March, 2026 at 5pm.
announcements.title: In His Presence

announcements.details: All parishioners who want to purchase the church cloth should kindly register with the church secretary within the week at the church office.
announcements.title: Church Cloth Sales

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Marriage School re-opens on Sunday 19th April, 2026. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest.
announcements.title: Marriage School

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: Monday at 6am, Tuesday - Friday at 5:30am and 6pm

masses.subtitle: Wednesday at 7pm
masses.title: Solemnity of the Annunciation of the Lord

masses.details: Stations of the Cross will be held in the church every Friday during Lent, immediately after the evening mass.

masses.title: Road to Calvary with Bakhita Arts & the Choir

masses.details: Rosary prayers begin 30 mins before mass
masses.subtitle: Saturday at 6:30am
masses.title: Saturday Morning Mass
